use_cases: Displaying available icons in a design system documentation
Creating an icon picker or selector interface for applications
Showcasing icon library collections with visual feedback
Building a searchable icon browser with hover previews
ai_summary: A flexible icon grid component that displays icons in a responsive grid layout with staggered entrance animations orchestrated via Framer Motion. Each icon is contained in a hoverable card with subtle elevation and background transitions, making it ideal for design system documentation or icon picker interfaces.
